name: Salve of Antiparalysis (Greater)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Applying this filmy salve to a creature helps it overcome magical paralysis. If the creature is petrified, it returns to normal, and for removing paralysis, the salve's counteract modifier is [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31} and its counteract rank is 6th.
